sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42141" key="e)ratogle/faros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρᾰτο-γλέφᾰρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n42141.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with lovely eyes,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Λατοῦς ἔρνος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0203.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Limen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (prob.).</sense> </entryFree>
